Format a Single P-Value

Source: R/p_format_utils.R
format_single_p.Rd

Internal helper function to format a single p-value.

Usage

format_single_p(p, digits, leading.zero, scientific, decimal.mark)

Arguments

p

Single numeric p-value.

digits

Number of decimal places.

leading.zero

Whether to include leading zero.

scientific

Whether to use scientific notation.

decimal.mark

Character string to use as the decimal mark.

Value

Formatted character string.

On this page
